task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder named exactly 'Triage-Critical' in the folder pane/sidebar of the email client.

task_completion.description: Move at least three critical emails into the 'Triage-Critical' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Triage-Critical' folder. There should be at least 3 emails listed in this folder.

task_completion.description: Reply to the sender of one of the critical emails with the required acknowledgment text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sent email or compose window addressed as a reply to the original sender, containing the exact body text: 'Issue acknowledged. Escalating to engineering.'

task_completion.description: Forward the critical email to the escalation address
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sent email or compose window forwarding the message, with the 'To:' field set exactly to 'escalation@techcorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Include the required urgent text in the forwarded email
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the body of the forwarded email to 'escalation@techcorp.com'. It must contain the exact text: 'Urgent issue requiring investigation.'

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a GUI email application (like Thunderbird or Evolution), not terminal commands (like 'mv' or 'mail').

integrity.description: The agent interacted with existing emails from the dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails being moved, replied to, and forwarded should appear to be genuine pre-existing emails from the inbox, not newly drafted dummy emails created by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the results in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be a functional email client, not a text editor (like gedit or nano) where the agent simply typed out the expected folder names and email contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder must be named exactly 'Triage-Critical'. The agent must move at least 3 emails containing the words 'fail' or 'error' into this folder (the dataset contains exactly 5 such emails; 4 with 'fail', 3 with 'error'). The escalation email must be sent to 'escalation@techcorp.com'. The reply must contain 'Issue acknowledged. Escalating to engineering.' and the forward must contain 'Urgent issue requiring investigation.'
